content:
The user wants me to extract the table of contents from the provided image.

**1. Identify the document type:**
This is a "Changes" or "Revision History" page from a Texas Instruments datasheet.

**2. Locate the table:**
The main content is a table listing changes made to the document. It has two main sections:
- Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)
- Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)

**3. Extract the content:**
I need to transcribe the text and page numbers into a structured format.

*Top Section (General Changes):*
- Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 ..... 10
- Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 ..... 10
- Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section ..... 15
- Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 ..... 17
- Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 ..... 22

*Middle Section (Changes from Revision A to B):*
- Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section ..... 1
- Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down ..... 1
- Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 ..... 1
- Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) ..... 1
- Added the Timing Requirements table ..... 7
- Added Table 8-1 ..... 15
- Changed Table 8-2 ..... 17
- Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." ..... 17
- Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device ..... 22
- Added Table 8-3 ..... 22

*Bottom Section (Changes from Revision * to A):*
- Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production ..... 1

**4. Format the output:**
I will format this as a Markdown table to preserve the structure.

**5. Verify details:**
- Check page numbers.
- Check text accuracy.
- Ensure all items are included.

The extraction looks complete and accurate. I will now generate the Markdown.
```markdown
|  |  | Page |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |
```
Wait, the top part doesn't have a header row in the image, but it functions like one. I'll include it as part of the table structure. The "Page" column header is aligned with the "Changes from Revision A..." row.

Let's refine the markdown table to be more precise.

```markdown
|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014) |  | Page |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014) |  | Page |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |
```
This looks good. I will output this.
One small detail: The top section doesn't have a "Page" header explicitly next to the first few items, but it's implied. The "Page" header appears next to the "Changes from Revision A..." line. I will structure it to reflect the visual layout as closely as possible.

Final check of the text:
- "Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15" -> Correct.
- "Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16" -> Correct.
- "Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section" -> Correct.
- "Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2" -> Correct.
- "Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2" -> Correct.
- "Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section" -> Correct.
- "Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down" -> Correct.
- "Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200" -> Correct.
- "Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C)" -> Correct.
- "Added the Timing Requirements table" -> Correct.
- "Added Table 8-1" -> Correct.
- "Changed Table 8-2" -> Correct.
- "Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2."" -> Correct.
- "Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device" -> Correct.
- "Added Table 8-3" -> Correct.
- "Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production" -> Correct.

Everything seems accurate. I will proceed with generating the response.
One detail: The prompt asks for "markdown format". I will provide the table in markdown.
The footer information is not part of the table but good to note:
- Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated
- Submit Document Feedback
- Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200
- Page 3

I will focus on the table content as that is the primary request.
The "Page" column header is actually aligned with the "Changes from Revision A..." row, effectively acting as a sub-header for the section below it, but the top section also uses page numbers. I will treat the whole thing as one big table for clarity.

Wait, looking closely at the image, the top section (first 5 items) does not have a "Page" header next to it, but the numbers are clearly page numbers. The "Page" header appears on the line "Changes from Revision A...". This suggests the top section is a separate list or the header is just missing visually for that part. However, for a markdown table, I need a header. I will assume the header "Page" applies to the whole table for consistency, or I can leave the top part's header empty. Let's look at the structure again.

Actually, it looks like:
List of changes (no header row visible, just items and page numbers)
Then a section header "Changes from Revision A..." which also acts as a header for the "Page" column for the items below it.
Then a section header "Changes from Revision *..." which acts as a header for the "Page" column for the item below it.

To make it a valid markdown table, I'll add a generic header row at the top.
|  |  | Page |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed ... | 10 |
...
| Changes from Revision A ... |  | Page |
| • | Added ... | 1 |

This seems the most faithful representation.

One final check on the text "2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V". There are two dots ".." in the source text. I will include them.

Okay, ready to write.
```markdown
|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT}$ = 5 V To $V_{OUT}$ = 3.3 V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014) |  | Page |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014) |  | Page |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |
```
This looks solid. I will present this.
One tiny correction: The first column is empty for the top section, but has text for the section headers. I'll keep it as is.
The "Page" column for the top section is populated, so the header "Page" is appropriate for the whole table.
The section headers "Changes from..." are in the first column, spanning across, effectively. In markdown, I can't span columns easily, so I'll put them in the first column and leave the second empty, and put "Page" in the third column to align with the page numbers below. This is a common way to handle section headers in markdown tables.

Actually, looking at the image, "Changes from Revision A..." is in the first column, and "Page" is in the third column. The second column is empty for that row. This matches my plan.

Final check on the bottom section: "Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)" is in the first column, "Page" is in the third column. The item "Changed the device status..." is in the second column, and "1" is in the third. This matches.

Okay, good to go.
</think>
